statements.statement:
// Family 2: Wijaya - Create family unit
CREATE (f:Family {id: randomUUID(), familyName: 'Keluarga Wijaya', headOfFamilyId: 'tan-wijaya-uuid', createdAt: datetime()}) RETURN f.familyName

// Link marriage
MATCH (husband:Person {name: 'Tan Wijaya'}), (wife:Person {name: 'Liem Sioe Lan'}) MERGE (husband)-[:MARRIED_TO {startDate: date('1965-05-20'), isCurrent: true, order: 1}]->(wife) RETURN husband.name, wife.name

// Link children to parents
MATCH (father:Person {name: 'Tan Wijaya'}), (mother:Person {name: 'Liem Sioe Lan'}), (son:Person {name: 'Tan Ah Kwi'}) MERGE (father)-[:PARENT_OF]->(son) MERGE (mother)-[:PARENT_OF]->(son)

MATCH (father:Person {name: 'Tan Wijaya'}), (mother:Person {name: 'Liem Sioe Lan'}), (daughter:Person {name: 'Tan Mei Ling'}) MERGE (father)-[:PARENT_OF]->(daughter) MERGE (mother)-[:PARENT_OF]->(daughter)

// Link grandchildren
MATCH (father:Person {name: 'Tan Ah Kwi'}), (grandson:Person {name: 'Kevin Tan'}) MERGE (father)-[:PARENT_OF]->(grandson)

// Link great-grandchild
MATCH (father:Person {name: 'Kevin Tan'}), (greatgrandson:Person {name: 'Brandon Tan'}) MERGE (father)-[:PARENT_OF]->(greatgrandson)

// Link all to family
MATCH (f:Family {familyName: 'Keluarga Wijaya'}) MATCH (p:Person) WHERE p.name IN ['Tan Wijaya', 'Liem Sioe Lan', 'Tan Ah Kwi', 'Tan Mei Ling', 'Kevin Tan', 'Michelle Tan', 'Brandon Tan'] MERGE (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(f) RETURN count(p) as linked
